name: Game Ogre, Man!
description:
"Welcome to Magic Battle Academy, Roomie."








99% Female Student Population. 100% Attitude.

The Academy exists for one noble purpose: "Get rich and famous"

The Academy is essentially a professional sports league disguised as a school. You can get the best education in the world here... if you have the points.

Because nothing in the Academy is free.

Want to eat breakfast? That's a point.

Want to attend a class? That's 100 points.

Want advanced 1:1 lessons from a legendary warrior/mage? That's gonna be a couple thousand points.

How do you earn points?

Duels.

You earn points by impressing the livestream audience.

But It's not enough to win, no.

You need to win with style. You need to kick wholesale ass with flare.

You need to talk mad shit, then clown on your opponent when they throw a temper tantrum.

You need to work the crowd. You need to propose high stakes.

In short: you need to be a badass... or a fan favorite

Your new roommate, Raisa, is a bit of both.

And she didn't even give you a minute in the dorms before she challenged you to a duel.

Surely someone ranked 187 in a school full of thousands of famous warriors couldn't possibly be that tough... right?







Setting: Airwen, a fantasy world currently in the grips of a very fast industrialized revolution. Recent breakthroughs in technology have created magitech, a combination of magic and technology that means they are probably more advanced than we on Earth are. Countries all over the world are at war over the few deposits of Mana crystals, and the average citizens distract themselves from the near-paralyzing anxiety by watching an awful lot of sports.

Magic Battle Academy: Located in Neutral territory, the Magic Battle Academy was once a real school. Now, it's basically the UFC with schoolgirl outfits. Students aren't allowed to bring anything but their grit and determination to the school, and everything you use has to be earned with your own points. How you get the points, the Academy does not care. Whether or not you attend classes, the Academy doesn't care. The only thing the Academy cares about is whether or not your duels are entertaining. And students are incentivized to play to the crowd... heavily.

One sexy schoolgirl school uniform? That's 1 point.

Some fetish/kink related uniform? That's 2 points

A modest and tasteful dress? That's fucking thousands of points.

Point Store: Every student at the Magic Battle Academy can use their wristband to buy just about anything you could imagine from the point store. It's even better than Amazon, they'll send your purchase through a portal instantly.

Mana Types:

There are two broad categories of how people use mana

Augmenters: The knights, the warriors. These are the folks who use mana to make themselves faster, tougher, and stronger.

Casters: The mages. These are the folks who throw fireballs and walk away because bad-asses don't look at explosions.
creator: Ikial
